hero.title: Discover Your Professional Self
hero.subtitle: XIMA helps you understand your professional strengths and weaknesses through our unique 5-pillar assessment system, matching you with the perfect career opportunities.

ximatar_intro.storytelling: We don't define people with labels. We reveal the dynamic between what moves them, what lifts them, and what holds them back
ximatar_intro.explanation: In XIMA, a XIMAtar is not just a reflection of abilities. It is a living archetype — built from the tension between your highest potential, your current limitation, and your internal force of will
ximatar_intro.assignment_logic: Each XIMAtar is assigned based on: your strongest pillar (your edge), your weakest pillar (your friction point), and your Drive level (your inner fuel)
ximatar_intro.compass: A XIMAtar is not a label — it is a compass. It shows who you are, what shapes your progress, and what will elevate your next chapter

drive_paths.high_desc: Already activating change — moving with intention, taking initiative, and pushing boundaries
drive_paths.medium_desc: Stable but not leveraged — capable and consistent, with untapped potential waiting to be ignited
drive_paths.low_desc: Potential still dormant — not yet mobilized, but with latent energy that can be awakened

pillars.title: The Five Pillars of XIMA Intelligence
pillars.storytelling: We don't define people with labels. We reveal the dynamic between what moves them, what lifts them, and what holds them back
pillars.ximatar_intro: In XIMA, a XIMAtar is not just a reflection of abilities. It is a living archetype — built from the tension between your highest potential, your current limitation, and your internal force of will
pillars.dimensions_intro: XIMA evaluates five dimensions of professional intelligence
pillars.assignment_logic: Each XIMAtar is assigned based on: your strongest pillar (your edge), your weakest pillar (your friction point), and your Drive level (your inner fuel)
pillars.drive_paths: This creates 12 archetypes, each expressed in three Drive-paths: High Drive — already activating change, Medium Drive — stable but not leveraged, Low Drive — potential still dormant
pillars.compass: A XIMAtar is not a label — it is a compass. It shows who you are, what shapes your progress, and what will elevate your next chapter
pillars.explanation: Each score is computed from behavioral answers, situational choices, cognitive patterns, and writing style analysis

computational.name: Computational Power
computational.description: The ability to break down complex problems into logical steps, use data and tools to find efficient solutions, and think systematically about challenges
computational.as_strength: You are structured, precise, and fast under pressure
computational.as_weakness: You may struggle with systems, avoid complexity, or lose clarity

communication.name: Communication
communication.description: How effectively you express ideas, listen actively, build meaningful relationships, and collaborate with others to achieve shared goals
communication.as_weakness: You may hold back, lose clarity, or struggle to vocalize your thoughts

knowledge.name: Knowledge
knowledge.description: Your depth of expertise in key areas, ability to learn continuously, and skill in applying what you know to real-world situations
knowledge.as_strength: You synthesize deeply, connect insights, and ground decisions
knowledge.as_weakness: You may act on assumptions, avoid research, or stay on the surface

creativity.name: Creativity
creativity.description: Your capacity to generate fresh ideas, see problems from new angles, embrace innovative thinking, and discover unconventional solutions
creativity.as_strength: You see possibilities, adapt fluidly, and innovate
creativity.as_weakness: You may avoid risk, prefer the known, or resist ideation

drive.name: Drive
drive.description: Your inner motivation to pursue ambitious goals, bounce back from setbacks, take initiative, and maintain commitment to excellence
drive.drive_note: Drive doesn't define skill — it defines trajectory
drive.as_strength: You are self-motivated, resilient, and action-oriented
drive.as_weakness: You may hesitate, delay action, or lack momentum

computational_power.name: Computational Power
computational_power.tagline: Analyze, process, and solve complex problems with precision
computational_power.description: The ability to break down complex problems, analyze data, and find technical solutions through logical and structured thinking.
how_we_evaluate: Ability to automate processes and optimize workflows
Systems thinking and methodical approach to technical challenges
tips: Practice with logic puzzles and programming challenges
Develop data analysis and visualization skills

communication.name: Communication
communication.tagline: Connect, persuade, and inspire through words and actions
communication.description: The art of conveying ideas clearly, building meaningful relationships, and positively influencing through effective interactions.
how_we_evaluate: Expressive clarity and adaptation to different audiences
Active listening and conflict management ability
tips: Develop empathetic listening and constructive feedback
Study storytelling and non-verbal communication techniques

knowledge.name: Knowledge
knowledge.tagline: Understand deeply and apply wisdom with mastery
knowledge.description: The depth of understanding in specific areas and the ability to acquire, organize, and effectively apply information.
how_we_evaluate: Breadth and depth of specialized expertise
Continuous learning ability and knowledge transfer
Quality of documentation and knowledge sharing
tips: Keep a learning journal and structured notes
Teach others what you learn to consolidate knowledge

creativity.name: Creativity
creativity.tagline: Innovate, imagine, and transform ideas into reality
creativity.description: The capacity to generate original ideas, combine concepts in new ways, and find innovative solutions to existing problems.
how_we_evaluate: Originality in problem-solving and idea generation
Lateral thinking ability and unexpected connections
Balance between innovation and practicality in execution
tips: Explore completely new fields and disciplines
Experiment with prototypes and unconventional approaches

drive.name: Drive
drive.tagline: Pursue goals with determination and resilience
drive.description: The inner drive that keeps you focused, the ability to overcome obstacles and maintain momentum toward your goals.
how_we_evaluate: Ability to set and pursue long-term goals
Resilience in the face of challenges and setbacks
Initiative and proactivity in tackling new opportunities
tips: Set SMART goals with celebratable milestones
Develop routines and habits that support your goals
Find sources of inspiration and maintain clear vision

about.title: About XIMA
about.subtitle: Revolutionizing the job matching process through deep professional assessment
about.match_problem_subtitle: In today's job market, both employers and job seekers face significant challenges in finding the right fit.
about.match_problem_description: Traditional hiring processes often fail to identify the best matches between professionals and opportunities. Resumes and interviews provide limited insight into a candidate's true potential, while job descriptions rarely capture the real essence of a role or company culture.
about.solution_description: XIMA was developed to address this fundamental problem by creating a comprehensive assessment framework that looks beyond surface qualifications to the core attributes that determine professional success.
about.five_pillars_description: XIMA evaluates professionals across five fundamental dimensions that together provide a comprehensive view of their potential:
about.experience_pillar: Experience: Professional history, skills, and knowledge acquired
about.intelligence_pillar: Intelligence: Cognitive abilities, learning capacity, and problem-solving
about.motivation_pillar: Motivation: Drive, ambition, and what energizes the individual
about.attitude_pillar: Attitude: Approach to work, challenges, and collaboration
about.analysis_pillar: Analysis: Critical thinking, decision making, and reasoning
about.ximatar_description: Every professional's assessment results in a unique XIMATAR - a visual representation of their professional identity using animal characteristics that highlight their strengths and areas for development.
about.why_animals_description: Animal avatars provide intuitive, memorable representations of complex professional traits. Just as each animal species has evolved unique adaptations to thrive in its environment, each professional has developed distinct capabilities that make them valuable in specific contexts.
about.features_description: Each XIMATAR's appearance reflects the individual's assessment results, with physical features representing different strengths, capabilities, and potential growth areas.
about.mentor_matching_description: Based on the XIMATAR, XIMA pairs professionals with mentors who have complementary strengths, enabling targeted development in areas of opportunity.
about.job_seekers_2: Get matched with opportunities where you'll thrive
about.job_seekers_4: Connect with mentors who complement your profile
about.job_seekers_5: Increase job satisfaction and career progression
about.employers_1: Find candidates who truly fit your needs
about.employers_3: Build more effective and complementary teams
about.ready_subtitle: Join thousands of professionals who have found their perfect career match through XIMA.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At XIMA, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our platform.
privacy.data_collection_content:
We collect information you provide directly to us, including:
• Account information (name, email, password)
• Profile data (CV, skills, work experience)
• Assessment responses and XIMAtar profile data
• Communication preferences

We also automatically collect certain information when you use our platform, including device information, log data, and usage patterns.
privacy.data_usage_content:
We use the information we collect to:
• Provide, maintain, and improve our services
• Generate your XIMAtar profile and personalized recommendations
• Match you with relevant job opportunities
• Communicate with you about our services
• Ensure platform security and prevent fraud

We process your assessment data using AI to generate insights and recommendations. This constitutes automated profiling under GDPR Article 22.
privacy.data_security_content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. This includes encryption, access controls, and regular security assessments.
privacy.your_rights_content:
Under GDPR, you have the right to:
• Access your personal data
• Rectify inaccurate data
• Request deletion of your data
• Object to processing
• Data portability
• Withdraw consent

To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@xima.app
privacy.contact_content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy@xima.app

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your access to and use of XIMA's platform and services. By using our platform, you agree to be bound by these terms.
terms.acceptance_content: By accessing or using XIMA, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our platform.
terms.services_content:
XIMA provides a professional matching platform that uses AI-powered assessments to create professional profiles (XIMAtar) and connect candidates with employers. Our services include:
• Professional assessment and profiling
• Job matching and recommendations
• Communication tools for candidates and employers
• Career development resources
terms.user_obligations_content:
As a user of XIMA, you agree to:
• Provide accurate and truthful information
• Maintain the confidentiality of your account
• Not misuse or attempt to manipulate the platform
• Respect the privacy and rights of other users
• Comply with all applicable laws and regulations
terms.liability_content: XIMA provides its services "as is" and makes no warranties regarding the accuracy of assessments or the success of job matches. We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform.
terms.termination_content: We may terminate or suspend your access to XIMA at any time, with or without cause. Upon termination, your right to use the platform ceases immediately. You may request deletion of your data in accordance with our Privacy Policy.
terms.changes_content: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new terms on our platform and updating the "Last updated" date.

open1.title: How to Answer Well
open1.body:
Strong answers describe a specific situation with measurable impact. Use the STAR method:

**Situation:** Set the context (what was the challenge?)
**Task:** Your specific responsibility
**Action:** What YOU did (be specific about your contribution)
**Result:** Outcomes with numbers if possible

Example: 'Led a team of 5 to reduce customer onboarding time from 2 weeks to 3 days, increasing activation by 40%.'

Be specific about YOUR contribution, not just the team's success. Watch: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0vNUxleEyoo

open2.title: How to Answer Well
open2.body:
Self-awareness is key here. Strong answers identify a genuine growth area and show proactive steps to improve.

Avoid vague responses like 'I work too hard.' Instead, be specific:

'I struggle with delegating technical tasks. I'm addressing this by:
- Starting with small delegations
- Creating clear handoff documents
- Scheduling weekly check-ins instead of daily ones'

Show you're taking ownership of your development. Watch: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tJxFZrMxT3s

examplesByCategory.comp_power: Computational Power questions assess your ability to analyze data, solve problems systematically, and use technology effectively. Strong performers break complex problems into steps, validate assumptions with data, and iterate based on results.
examplesByCategory.communication: Communication questions evaluate how you express ideas, listen actively, and adapt your style to different audiences. Effective communicators lead with outcomes, use concrete examples, and seek feedback to ensure understanding.
examplesByCategory.knowledge: Knowledge questions measure your depth of expertise and ability to learn continuously. Top performers maintain learning habits, share knowledge with others (which reinforces their own understanding), and apply new information quickly.
examplesByCategory.creativity: Creativity questions assess your ability to generate novel ideas and find unconventional solutions. Creative thinkers embrace constraints, seek diverse perspectives, and prototype quickly to test ideas before committing resources.
examplesByCategory.drive: Drive questions measure your motivation, resilience, and ability to pursue long-term goals. High-drive individuals set clear milestones, learn from setbacks, and maintain focus despite obstacles.

examplesByCategory.creativity: Operations Creativity questions assess your ability to solve recurring problems and improve service experiences. Creative operations professionals test small changes, borrow solutions from other contexts, and involve staff in developing improvements.
examplesByCategory.drive: Operations Drive questions measure your resilience under pressure and ability to sustain long-term quality. High-drive operations professionals prioritize ruthlessly, celebrate progress, and follow through systematically after failures.

guide.title: How XIMAtar Assessment Works
guide.subtitle: Discover your unique professional archetype through our comprehensive assessment system based on 5 core pillars.

step1.title: CV Upload
step1.description: Upload your CV for AI-powered analysis of your professional experience and skills.

step2.title: Baseline Assessment
step2.description: Select your field and complete the initial evaluation with multiple-choice questions.

step3.title: Deep Assessment
step3.description: Answer 21 questions plus open responses to reveal your unique profile.

step4.title: XIMAtar Assignment
step4.description: Receive your personalized XIMAtar archetype based on your pillar scores.

guide.pillars_description: Each pillar represents a core dimension of professional capability. Your unique combination determines your XIMAtar.

pillars.computational: Analytical thinking, problem-solving, and data-driven decision making.
pillars.communication: Clarity of expression, active listening, and collaborative dialogue.
pillars.knowledge: Domain expertise, continuous learning, and wisdom application.
pillars.creativity: Innovation, lateral thinking, and novel solution generation.

guide.scoring_description: Each pillar is scored from 0-10 based on your assessment responses. Here's an example profile:
guide.result_explanation: With highest Creativity (9.1) and strong Computational Power (8.2), this profile matches the Fox archetype - a Strategic Opportunist who excels at innovative problem-solving.
guide.ximatars_description: Each XIMAtar represents a unique combination of strengths and work style. Discover which archetype matches your profile.
guide.logic_step1_desc: Your responses to 21 multiple-choice questions and 2 open-ended questions are analyzed to calculate scores for each of the 5 pillars.
guide.logic_step2_desc: Your pillar profile is compared against the ideal vectors for each of the 12 XIMatars using distance algorithms and weighted matching.
guide.logic_step3_desc: A 25% matching bonus is applied when your strongest pillar aligns with a XIMAtar's primary characteristic, ensuring authentic matches.
guide.logic_step4_desc: The XIMAtar with the closest match to your unique profile becomes your archetype, along with personalized insights about your strengths and growth areas.
guide.cta_description: Start your assessment journey now and unlock personalized insights about your professional potential.

guard.description: Analysis of response patterns and potential risks
guard.framing_decision_pass: Reasoning is internally consistent across sections.

guard.framing_decision_flag: Notable gap between how the problem is framed and conclusions drawn.
guard.execution_impact_pass: Good balance between tactical and strategic thinking.
guard.execution_impact_tactical: Leans toward immediate execution over long-term impact.
guard.execution_impact_strategic: Emphasizes strategy but may lack concrete next steps.
guard.confidence_overconfident: High confidence with limited supporting evidence.
guard.confidence_underconfident: Stronger reasoning than self-reported confidence suggests.
guard.depth_shallow: Response may lack depth in key areas.
guard.depth_good: Clear consideration of trade-offs and constraints.
guard.risk_inconsistent_reasoning: Inconsistent reasoning between problem analysis and conclusions
guard.risk_tactical_bias: May focus on execution at the expense of strategic thinking
guard.risk_overconfidence: Self-assessment may not match actual capability
guard.risk_surface_level: May lack depth when handling complex problems

guard.question_self_doubt: What would increase your confidence in this solution?
guard.question_depth: Can you elaborate on the trade-offs you considered?

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At XIMA S.r.l., we are committed to protecting your privacy and personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your information when you use our platform. By using XIMA, you consent to the practices described in this policy.
privacy.data_collection_content:
We collect the following types of personal data:

• Account information: email address, name, and profile details you provide during registration
• Professional data: CV uploads, assessment responses, and career preferences
• Usage data: how you interact with our platform, including pages visited and features used
• Technical data: device information, IP address, and browser type for security and optimization purposes

All data is collected with your explicit consent and is necessary for providing our services.
privacy.data_usage_content:
Your data is used for the following purposes:

• Creating and maintaining your XIMAtar professional profile
• AI-powered assessment analysis to provide personalized insights
• Matching you with relevant career opportunities and challenges
• Facilitating communication between candidates, businesses, and mentors
• Improving our platform and developing new features
• Complying with legal obligations and preventing fraud

We use automated decision-making (profiling) to generate your XIMAtar archetype. You can object to this processing at any time through your account settings.
privacy.data_security_content:
We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data:

• Encryption of data in transit (TLS/SSL) and at rest
• Secure cloud infrastructure hosted in EU data centers
• Row-level security ensuring users can only access their own data
• Regular security audits and vulnerability assessments
• Strict access controls for our team members

Despite our best efforts, no system is 100% secure. We encourage you to use strong passwords and keep your account credentials confidential.
privacy.your_rights_content:
Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights:

• Right of Access: Request a copy of all personal data we hold about you
• Right to Rectification: Correct any inaccurate or incomplete data
• Right to Erasure: Request deletion of your personal data ('right to be forgotten')
• Right to Restriction: Limit how we process your data in certain circumstances
• Right to Data Portability: Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format
• Right to Object: Object to automated profiling and direct marketing
• Right to Withdraw Consent: Withdraw consent at any time without affecting prior processing

To exercise any of these rights, contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy@xima.app.
privacy.contact_content:
For any privacy-related inquiries or to exercise your rights, please contact:

XIMA S.r.l.
Via Torino, 2
20123 Milano (MI), Italia

Data Protection Officer: privacy@xima.app
General inquiries: info@xima.app

You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Italian Data Protection Authority (Garante per la protezione dei dati personali) if you believe your rights have been violated.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to XIMA. These Terms of Service govern your access to and use of the XIMA platform operated by XIMA S.r.l. By registering for an account or using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms. Please read them carefully.
terms.acceptance_content:
By creating an account or accessing XIMA, you confirm that:

• You are at least 18 years old or have parental consent
• You have read and understood these Terms of Service
• You agree to be bound by these terms and our Privacy Policy
• The information you provide is accurate and complete

If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our platform.
terms.services_content:
XIMA provides a professional assessment and matching platform that includes:

• XIMAtar Assessment: AI-powered evaluation of your professional profile across five pillars (Computational Power, Communication, Knowledge, Creativity, Drive)
• Career Matching: Connection with businesses seeking candidates that match your profile
• Challenge System: Structured challenges to demonstrate your capabilities to potential employers
• Mentor Network: Access to professional mentors for career guidance
• Feed & Communication: Tools to engage with opportunities and communicate with businesses

We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of our services with reasonable notice.
terms.user_obligations_content:
When using XIMA, you agree to:

• Provide accurate and truthful information in your profile and assessments
• Keep your account credentials secure and not share them with others
• Not attempt to manipulate assessment results or submit false information
• Respect other users and maintain professional conduct in all communications
• Not use the platform for any unlawful purpose or to harass others
• Not attempt to reverse-engineer, scrape, or interfere with the platform

Violation of these obligations may result in account suspension or termination.
terms.liability_content:
To the fullest extent permitted by law:

• XIMA provides services 'as is' without warranties of any kind
• We do not guarantee employment outcomes or business results
• We are not responsible for decisions made by third parties based on your profile
• Our liability is limited to direct damages up to the amount you paid us (if any) in the past 12 months
• We are not liable for indirect, consequential, or punitive damages

Nothing in these terms limits our liability for fraud, gross negligence, or matters that cannot be excluded by law.
terms.termination_content:
You may delete your account at any time through your account settings. Upon deletion:

• Your profile and personal data will be permanently removed
• Assessment results and XIMAtar profile will be deleted
• Challenge submissions will be anonymized
• Chat messages will be anonymized

We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or engage in fraudulent activity. We will provide notice when reasonably possible.
terms.changes_content:
We may update these Terms of Service from time to time to reflect changes in our services or legal requirements. When we make material changes:

• We will notify you via email or in-app notification
• The updated terms will be posted with a new 'Last updated' date
• Continued use of XIMA after changes take effect constitutes acceptance

For questions about these terms, contact us at info@xima.app.
